title: Horrible Mom Gifts | #shorts
full_text: no more mom mugs find your bliss find your bliss how about my kids find medical school bath robes who is even living this Spa life in their own home why so many hand tows what is going on moist hand cream more hand cream more hand cream how much oh it does smell good it does smell good yes but the point is enough is enough get more inspired go to Pinterest right now you can shop right from these guides are you kidding me this is what mom's want attach it to my kids hands please and look at this a fish bottle anything that makes water more exciting I will take it give me a whole school of them this holiday ditch the stereotypical gifts shop on Pinterest instead just look at this I can't even you know what I'm done talking to you
